meta.description: Compressed hunt cards for unique — one-line detection rules for bulk scanning
meta.usage: Load cards into context. For each card, grep target code for card.grep. On hit: execute card.check steps directly. Only read full DB entry (card.ref + card.lines) for confirmed true/likely positives.

cards.title: Vulnerable Code Pattern

check: VERIFY: // ❌ CRITICAL: No access control on callback

cards.antipattern: TransferHelper.safeTransferFrom(token1, source, address(pool), amount1Owed);

cards.title: Compiler-Level Vulnerability Patterns
cards.detect: The Vyper compiler versions 0.2.15, 0.2.16, and 0.3.0 had a bug in the code generation for the `@nonreentrant` decorator.
check: VERIFY: Vyper compiler versions 0.2.15, 0.2.16, and 0.3.0 had a bug in the code generation for the `@nonreentrant` decorator.

cards.title: 1. Transient Storage (EIP-1153) Authorization Bypass via CREATE2
cards.detect: EIP-1153 introduced `tstore`/`tload` opcodes for transient storage that persists only within a single transaction.
check: VERIFY: EIP-1153 introduced `tstore`/`tload` opcodes for transient storage that persists only within a single transaction.
ANTIPATTERN: Transient storage used for callback authorization
cards.antipattern: Transient storage used for callback authorization

check: VERIFY: When a token's `_transfer()` function applies fees based on a percentage list where `sum(shares) > 100%`, the sender is...
ANTIPATTERN: transactionFee() splits fees by unbounded percentages
cards.antipattern: transactionFee() splits fees by unbounded percentages

cards.title: 3. Staking Reward Farming via CREATE2 Identity Rotation
cards.detect: When a staking contract calculates rewards per-address without tracking total claimed amounts globally, an attacker can...
check: VERIFY: When a staking contract calculates rewards per-address without tracking total claimed amounts globally, an attacker can...
ANTIPATTERN: Rewards calculated per-address without global tracking
cards.antipattern: Rewards calculated per-address without global tracking

cards.title: 4. Batch Array Refund Multiplication
cards.detect: When a sale/purchase function accepts arrays of recipients, rates, and refund flags, and processes refunds...
check: VERIFY: When a sale/purchase function accepts arrays of recipients, rates, and refund flags, and processes refunds...
ANTIPATTERN: buy() processes refunds per-array-element using msg.value

check: VERIFY: Bonding curve contracts calculate buy/sell prices using polynomial formulas.
ANTIPATTERN: Bonding curve price formula overflows at extreme amounts
cards.antipattern: Bonding curve price formula overflows at extreme amounts

cards.title: Economic Arbitrage Design Flaws
cards.detect: Arbitrary Swap Routing via Vault Deposits**: Vault deposit functions accept user-controlled swap routing data (e.
check: VERIFY: Arbitrary Swap Routing via Vault Deposits**: Vault deposit functions accept user-controlled swap routing data (e.

cards.antipattern: VaultRouter.deposit() accepts arbitrary swap routing data
cards.securePattern: Only allow routing through whitelisted pools

cards.title: Fee Mechanism Exploitation Patterns
cards.detect: Zero Quantity Fee Bypass**: Functions that calculate `totalPrice = quantity * pricePerItem` without requiring `quantity > 0`.
check: VERIFY: Zero Quantity Fee Bypass**: Functions that calculate `totalPrice = quantity * pricePerItem` without requiring `quantity > 0`.
ANTIPATTERN: Token has broken fee mechanism creating phantom balance
cards.antipattern: Token has broken fee mechanism creating phantom balance
cards.securePattern: Measure actual balance change, not transfer amount

cards.title: Liquidity Migration Exploit Patterns
cards.detect: The root causes fall into three distinct patterns:
check: VERIFY: root causes fall into three distinct patterns:
ANTIPATTERN: migrate() accepts arbitrary token0/token1 without validating against pair
cards.antipattern: migrate() accepts arbitrary token0/token1 without validating against pair
cards.securePattern: Use time-weighted average price instead of spot for migration

cards.title: msg.value in Loop Vulnerability
cards.detect: Solidity's `msg.value` is immutable for the duration of a transaction call.
check: VERIFY: Solidity's `msg.value` is immutable for the duration of a transaction call.
ANTIPATTERN: SushiMiso DutchAuction batch() forwards msg.value to each sub-call
cards.antipattern: SushiMiso DutchAuction batch() forwards msg.value to each sub-call
cards.securePattern: Only allow msg.value in first sub-call, or don't use delegatecall for payable

cards.title: NFT-Specific Exploit Patterns
cards.detect: Missing Buyer Validation in fillSellOrder()**: The marketplace's `fillSellOrder()` function validates only the seller's...
check: VERIFY: Missing Buyer Validation in fillSellOrder()**: The marketplace's `fillSellOrder()` function validates only the seller's...
ANTIPATTERN: Only seller signature validated, buyer address is caller-controlled
cards.antipattern: Only seller signature validated, buyer address is caller-controlled
cards.securePattern: Buyer must be msg.sender or provide a signature

cards.title: Skim Token Balance Attack Patterns
cards.detect: The root causes fall into two distinct patterns:
check: VERIFY: root causes fall into two distinct patterns:
ANTIPATTERN: Pair.skim() with fee-on-transfer token creates exploitable reserve gap
cards.antipattern: Pair.skim() with fee-on-transfer token creates exploitable reserve gap
cards.securePattern: Track actual received amounts, don't rely on skim()

cards.title: Stale/Cached State Exploit Patterns
cards.detect: Stale Global Variable Accumulation**: A storage variable updated during sells (`sellAmount`) is used in the sell logic...
check: VERIFY: Stale Global Variable Accumulation**: A storage variable updated during sells (`sellAmount`) is used in the sell logic...
ANTIPATTERN: Global sellAmount variable is inflated by buys, reduces burn on sells
cards.antipattern: Global sellAmount variable is inflated by buys, reduces burn on sells
cards.securePattern: Track sell amounts per address instead of globally

cards.title: Swap Metapool Attack Patterns
cards.detect: Virtual Price Dependency**: Metapools price their LP token component using the base pool's `virtual_price()`.
check: VERIFY: Virtual Price Dependency**: Metapools price their LP token component using the base pool's `virtual_price()`.
ANTIPATTERN: Metapool swap rate depends on base pool state
cards.antipattern: Metapool swap rate depends on base pool state
cards.securePattern: Verify metapool's virtual price against base pool before swap

cards.title: ConvertToShares Manipulation: Blocking Deposits via Direct Token Transfers
cards.detect: ERC4626 vaults typically calculate total assets using:
check: VERIFY: ERC4626 vaults typically calculate total assets using:
LOOK FOR: _totalAssets() using asset.balanceOf(address(this))
LOOK FOR: convertToShares without minimum check
cards.antipattern: balanceOf can be manipulated by direct transfers
cards.securePattern: Permanent dead shares prevent empty vault manipulation

cards.title: Cross-Contract Reentrancy Allows YIELD_TOKEN Theft in Multi-Vault ERC4626 Systems
cards.detect: The `WithdrawalRequestManager.stakeTokens()` function captures the initial `YIELD_TOKEN` balance **before** executing a...
check: VERIFY: `WithdrawalRequestManager.stakeTokens()` function captures the initial `YIELD_TOKEN` balance **before** executing a...
LOOK FOR: Balance snapshot before external calls: balanceOf() ... externalCall() ... balanceOf()
LOOK FOR: Multi-vault architecture with shared managers: isApprovedVault[vault]
cards.antipattern: Only validates first and last tokens, not middle path
cards.securePattern: Balance snapshot after all external calls

cards.title: Flash Loan Vault Deflation Attack: Draining Accumulated Yield via Share Price Reset
cards.detect: Most ERC4626 implementations calculate share price using:
check: VERIFY: Most ERC4626 implementations calculate share price using:
Does the protocol offer flash loans of ERC4626 shares?
Can the flash loan drain the entire underlying vault?
Is there rate/price validation after flash loan repayment?
LOOK FOR: Flash loan of ERC4626 shares without rate validation
cards.antipattern: Allows borrowing entire IBT supply without rate protection
cards.securePattern: Prevent borrowing amounts that could empty underlying vault
